creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: mr
Date: Tue Nov  5 20:34:42 2013
New Revision: 332905
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/332905

Log:
  Update qcad to 3.4.2.0
  
  PR:		ports/183346
  Submitted by:	rakuco@

Deleted:
  head/cad/qcad/files/patch-src_3rdparty_qt-labs-qtscriptgenerator-4.8.5_qtbindings_qtbindings.pro
  head/cad/qcad/files/patch-src_core_RMetaTypes.h
Modified:
  head/cad/qcad/Makefile
  head/cad/qcad/distinfo
  head/cad/qcad/files/patch-shared_app.pri
  head/cad/qcad/pkg-plist

Modified: head/cad/qcad/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/cad/qcad/Makefile	Tue Nov  5 19:45:13 2013	(r332904)
+++ head/cad/qcad/Makefile	Tue Nov  5 20:34:42 2013	(r332905)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	qcad
-PORTVERSION=	3.3.3.0
+PORTVERSION=	3.4.2.0
 CATEGORIES=	cad
 MASTER_SITES=	http://github.com/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}/archive/${DISTNAME}.tar.gz?dummy=/	\
 		https://github.com/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}/archive/${DISTNAME}.tar.gz?dummy=/
@@ -20,6 +20,7 @@ LIB_DEPENDS=	execinfo:${PORTSDIR}/devel/
 
 FETCH_ARGS=	-Fpr
 WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
+MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes
 
 USES=		gmake qmake
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
